scripts.check:banned: ! grep -rn --include='*.tsx' --include='*.ts' --include='*.md' --include='*.css' -E '오답제로|OdapZero|삼색개념|그물망학습|타이머학습|문제공간인식|셀프톡' app components lib content public
scripts.prebuild: mkdir -p public/fonts/pretendard && cp node_modules/pretendard/dist/web/variable/pretendardvariable-dynamic-subset.css public/fonts/pretendard/ && cp -R node_modules/pretendard/dist/web/variable/woff2-dynamic-subset public/fonts/pretendard/
